question: Will Gemma 4 124B be released?
textDescription:
For the purpose of this market, any Gemma 4 with 100-200B parameters counts as "close enough" to count. Gemma 4.5 or similar doesn't count. Must be released within 2 months of Gemma 4 initial releases
